message:
feat(html_export): add message grouping types for consolidated rendering

Add MessageGroupType and ToolResult types for improved HTML export:
- MessageGroupType: User, Assistant, System, ToolOnly variants
- CSS class and role icon methods for each group type
- ToolResult struct for extended tool output with status tracking
- Enables consolidated rendering of related messages in exports

Also updates .beads tracking files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
